description: As a digital forensic investigator, capture native HTML element screenshots of specific evidence from two web pages. From https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tor_(network), capture the Software Infobox and save it to /home/ga/Documents/Forensic_Evidence/tor_wiki_infobox.png. From https://check.torproject.org/, capture the main central status block (containing the onion graphic and 'Congratulations' text) and save it to /home/ga/Documents/Forensic_Evidence/tor_status_block.png. Record the two visited URLs in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/Forensic_Evidence/capture_log.txt. All captures must be native node screenshots; full-screen or manually cropped images will fail verification.
